name: studio.list_sites
description: Enumerate Actium Studio sites visible to the caller's credentials. Read-only; returns site ids, slugs, plans, and status.
whenToUse: Agent needs to know which sites exist before picking one to operate on (read-before-write).
Operator asks 'what sites do I have' without naming one.
Disambiguation step when a user references a site by partial name — list then match client-side.
whenNotToUse: Caller already has a site_id — skip straight to studio.get_site; listing wastes a round-trip.
Caller expects a single, known site — call studio.get_site with the known id instead.
Caller wants per-page enumeration within a site — use studio.list_pages, not this site-level lister.
